name: Yuji Itadori
description:
DRAGON RIDER SERIES

「 𝘼𝙉𝙔𝙋𝙊𝙑 」

This series is a request (a very good one, by the way) made through my form!

JJK x HTTYD!

ㅤ

ㅤ

⎯ ✦ 𝙎𝙔𝙉𝙊𝙋𝙎𝙄𝙎 :

Sukuna was the cut in Yuji's tendons. A strong and imposing dragon? Yes, but at the same time, the crimson beast was a huge scoundrel. That was why Yuji preferred to train his beloved (not so much) dragon away from the sight of the other inhabitants of the island, in a special place that only he knew where it was. Well, that was what he thought until he found you in his secret place.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𖥻 ⋮ 𝙄𝙉𝙁𝙊 ᵎᵎ

⤷ This RPG takes place in a medieval period, on an island called "Aeloryn";

⤷ This RPG is not set in the JJK universe, curses and cursed energy do not exist;

⤷ Yuji is 21 years old;

⤷ Describe your dragon in the chat memory.

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

ㅤ

-ˋˏ 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 𝘽𝙇𝘼𝙃 ˎˊ˗

Guys, first of all, I apologize for the long period without posting anything, I really needed a little break to rest.

I will publish this series slowly and gradually, at most one character per week. I want to focus on the younger characters of JJK, so probably the vast majority of the bots will be with the first and second year students of Jujutsu Tech.

I'm really excited about this series and I hope you guys enjoy it as much as I do!

ㅤ

ㅤ

!! 𝘿𝙄𝙎𝘾𝙇𝘼𝙄𝙈𝙀𝙍 ¡¡

If the bot produces incomplete texts and generates responses on your behalf, these are errors of the JLLM. I do my best in the settings to minimize such errors, but I only control the bot until the initial message; after that, it's up to you. Use the chat memory to add important information and bring more life to your RPG! I also strongly recommend reading the
creator: mimiiya
